basic_details.job_title: BEDF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Lab Analyst, Subject Matter Specialist Posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/ M.Sc in Biotechnology/ Food Technology/ Chemistry, M.Sc/ M.Tech in Food Technology/Life Science, Master Degree in Agronomy, Seed Technology, Genetic & Plant Breeding, Plant Protection, Agriculture Extension etc.
qualification.details: Lab Analyst (DNA Lab): M.Tech/ M.Sc in Biotechnology/ Food Technology/ Chemistry with a minimum of 4 years of experience in a Food testing lab and knowledge of DNA fingerprinting technology/GMO detection in plants and working experience with DNA extraction, PCR, RT-PCR etc. Lab Analyst (Quality): M.Sc/ M.Tech in Food Technology/Life Science with a minimum of 4 years of experience in a Food testing lab and knowledge of food testing. Desirable: Experience in quality testing of rice. Subject Matter Specialist: Master Degree in Agronomy, Seed Technology, Genetic & Plant Breeding, Plant Protection, Agriculture Extension etc. with a minimum of 4 years of experience in crop production/ seed production/Organic farming/Agricultural extension/ Agricultural Marketing etc. and Proficiency in office Software like Microsoft Office suit.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BEDF Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the BEDF Various Positions Recruitment 2026 is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BEDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various positions in the Basmati Export Development Foundation (BEDF) Recruitment 2026. These include roles like Lab Analyst and Subject Matter Specialist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Subject Matter Specialist post?
faq.answer: For the Subject Matter Specialist position, candidates need a Master's Degree in Agronomy, Seed Technology, Genetic & Plant Breeding, Plant Protection, or Agriculture Extension, along with at least 4 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the posts advertised by BEDF?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts in the BEDF Recruitment 2026 is 35 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for BEDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates are required to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for BEDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for the BEDF Various Positions Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the positions in BEDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for all the advertised positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for BEDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the BEDF Various Positions Recruitment 2026 will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the positions advertised by BEDF?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by the Basmati Export Development Foundation (BEDF) are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BEDF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for BEDF Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
